author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(poweredBy): minify slightly and make into correct URL (#2615)
body:
* fix(poweredBy): minify slightly and make into correct URL

FireFox is very picky about data URIs and as soon as it's containing `#`, it's interpreting it as a link instead of a data URI. You can escape those `#` with `%23`

fixes #2613

* fix: add sizes back
